CPCV - College Park Scholars-Civic Engagement for Social Good

CPDJ - College Park Scholars-Data Justice

CPCV100 College Park Scholars: Civic Engagement for Social Good First- Year Colloquium I (1 Credit) Introductory colloquium: Examination of issues related to civic engagement. Restriction: Must be in the College Park Scholars-Civic Engagement for Social Good (CPCV) program. Credit Only Granted for: BSCV181 or CPCV100. Formerly: BSCV181.

CPCV101 College Park Scholars: Civic Engagement for Social Good First- Year Colloquium II (1 Credit) Examination of domestic societal issues and their national, regional, and local dimensions from political, economic, and policy perspectives. Students will work with local direct service non-proﬁt organizations. Prerequisite: CPCV100. Restriction: Must be in the College Park Scholars Civic Engagement for Social Good (CPCV) program. Credit Only Granted for: BSCV182 or CPCV101. Formerly: BSCV182.

CPCV200 College Park Scholars: Civic Engagement for Social Good Second-Year Colloquium I (1 Credit) Through substantive civic engagement work in local communities, in- person classes, and reflective practice, students will develop essential skills to collaborate with organizations and stakeholders in order to create meaningful change in their communities. Prerequisite: CPCV101. Restriction: Must be in the College Park Scholars-Civic Engagement for Social Good (CPCV) program.
